blended.narrative: Stevens Pass is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.0 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,168 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 41.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 44" over the past week. Current depth: 74".
